seo.title: Astro tools directory
seo.description: A developer-first directory of Astro tools and references.

content.intro: A curated technical directory of tools, libraries, and deployment platforms specifically optimized for the Astro framework. These resources focus on improving developer experience with content collections, islands architecture, and high-performance static site generation.

entries.name: Pagefind
entries.description: Static search library that indexes Astro's build output to provide instant search results without a backend server.
cons: Requires a post-build step to generate index files

entries.name: Zod
entries.description: TypeScript-first schema declaration and validation library used in Astro Content Collections for type-safe frontmatter.
pros: Enforces strict data types for Markdown files
Provides autocomplete for frontmatter in IDEs
Eliminates runtime errors from missing content fields
cons: Learning curve for complex schema transformations

entries.name: Cloudflare Pages
entries.description: Hosting platform that integrates with Astro for edge deployment and SSR via the @astrojs/cloudflare adapter.
pros: Fast build times with Git integration
Support for Cloudflare Workers via Astro SSR
cons: Worker size limits on the free tier

entries.name: Starlight
entries.description: Official Astro documentation framework for building high-performance, accessible documentation sites with MDX support.
pros: Optimized for SEO and performance out of the box

entries.name: Astro Icon
entries.description: A component for Astro that optimizes SVG icons and integrates with Iconify for access to thousands of icon sets.
pros: Reduces HTML bloat compared to inline SVGs
cons: Requires configuration for custom local SVG directories

entries.name: Astro DB
entries.description: Managed SQL database designed specifically for Astro, allowing for local development and edge deployment.
cons: Currently limited to the Astro ecosystem

entries.name: Sharp
entries.description: High-performance Node.js image processing module used by Astro for resizing and converting images during build.
cons: Requires native binary compilation on some OS environments

entries.name: Tailwind CSS
entries.description: Utility-first CSS framework that integrates with Astro via a dedicated integration for rapid UI development.
pros: Fast integration via 'npx astro add tailwind'
cons: Can lead to cluttered HTML templates with many classes

entries.name: Decap CMS
entries.description: Git-based content management system that allows editors to update Markdown content directly in the repository.
pros: Version control for all content changes
cons: UI can feel dated compared to SaaS CMS options
Requires Git workflow knowledge for initial setup

entries.name: Astro Sitemap
entries.description: Official integration that automatically generates a sitemap.xml for your Astro project after every build.
pros: Ensures search engines index all pages
